jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Bombay Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bombay Hospital:
Bombay Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital!
